posts.text:
🔔 One thing about NOLA : they love Frankie Beverly and Philly artists down! @juviethegreat dives into the love and impact Frankie Beverly had on the people in NOLA.
➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

posts.text: I Love Witnessing History. Salute To Bam. He was out there hooping like Aja said to him “I’ll play you. One game. One-on-one. For what? Your heart.” Let’s Discuss…….

posts.text: Looks like “Magic City” Night on 3/16 has been shut down by the NBA after receiving backlash over the Atlanta Hawks collaboration with Magic City. Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa. Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.
